entries.title: ADR-004 col-023: Wave-Based Refactor Plan for HookType Blast Radius
Sequential Module Migration Pattern: Re-Export Bridges for Large Crate Restructuring
Batch bugfix swarm procedure: parallel investigators + parallel architects + single rust-dev + single tester
Tool rename blast radius: build passing is not sufficient
Implementation checklist items from approved design must be enumerated in the rust-dev spawn prompt — not left implicit in the investigator report
